title: Multiply and divide by 10
description: Practice multiplying and dividing whole numbers by ten.
topic_path: Module 1: Place value, rounding, and algorithms for addition and subtraction
Topic A: Place value of multi-digit whole numbers

assessment_items.question_content:
$2{,}900 \div 10=$  [[☃ numeric-input 1]]

$2{,}900 \times 10=$  [[☃ numeric-input 2]]
hints:
When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **left**.

When **dividing** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **right**.

When **dividing** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the right.

Number | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$2{,}900$ |$\searrow\goldD{2}$ | $\searrow\purpleD{9}$ | $\searrow\blueD{0}$ | $\searrow\greenD{0}$  
$2{,}900 \div 10$ |$?$ |$?$ |$?$| $?$

Number | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$2{,}900$ |$\searrow\goldD{2}$ | $\searrow\purpleD{9}$ | $\searrow\blueD{0}$ | $\searrow\greenD{\cancel0}$  
$2{,}900 \div 10$ | |$\goldD{2}$ | $\purpleD{9}$ |$\blueD{0}$

When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift our numbers $1$ place value to the left.

Number | Ten Thousands | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:  | :-: 
$2{,}900$| |$\swarrow\goldD{2}$ | $\swarrow\purpleD{9}$ | $\swarrow\blueD{0}$ | $\swarrow\greenD{0}$  
$2{,}900 \times 10$ | $?$ | $?$ |$?$ | $?$ | $?$

Number | Ten Thousands | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:  | :-: 
$2{,}900$| |$\swarrow\goldD{2}$ | $\swarrow\purpleD{9}$ | $\swarrow\blueD{0}$ | $\swarrow\greenD{0}$  
$2{,}900 \times 10$ | $\goldD{2}$ | $\purpleD{9}$ |$\blueD{0}$ | $\greenD{0}$ | $0$

The answers:

$\begin{align}
&\goldD2{,}\purpleD9\blueD0\greenD0 \div 10=\goldD2\purpleD9\blueD0 \\\\
&\goldD2{,}\purpleD9\blueD0\greenD0\times10=\goldD2\purpleD9{,}\blueD0\greenD00
\end{align}$

assessment_items.question_content:
[[☃ numeric-input 4]] $=50 \div 10$

[[☃ numeric-input 3]] $=50\times 10$
hints:
When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **left**.

When **dividing** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **right**.

When **dividing** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the right.

Number | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$50$ |  | $\searrow\blueD{5}$ | $\searrow\greenD{0}$  
$50 \div 10$ | |$?$| $?$

Number | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$50$ |  | $\searrow\blueD{5}$ | $\searrow\greenD{\cancel0}$  
$50 \div 10$ | | | $\blueD{5}$

When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the left.

Number | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$50$ |  | $\swarrow\blueD{5}$ | $\swarrow\greenD{0}$  
$50 \times 10$ |$?$ |$?$| $?$

Number | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$50$ |  | $\swarrow\blueD{5}$ | $\swarrow\greenD{0}$  
$50 \times 10$ |$\blueD{5}$ |$\greenD{0}$| $0$

The answers:

$\begin{align}
&\blueD5=\blueD5\greenD0 \div 10\\\\
&\blueD5\greenD00=\blueD5\greenD0\times10
\end{align}$

assessment_items.question_content:
$300 \times 10=$  [[☃ numeric-input 5]]

$300 \div 10=$  [[☃ numeric-input 6]]
hints:
When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **left**.

When **dividing** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **right**.

When **dividing** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the right.

Number | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$300$ | | $\searrow\purpleD{3}$ | $\searrow\blueD{0}$ | $\searrow\greenD{0}$  
$300 \div 10$ | |$?$| $?$| $?$

Number | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$300$ | | $\searrow\purpleD{3}$ | $\searrow\blueD{0}$ | $\searrow\greenD{\cancel0}$  
$300 \div 10$ | | | $\purpleD3$| $\blueD0$

When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the left.

Number | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$300$ | | $\swarrow\purpleD{3}$ | $\swarrow\blueD{0}$ | $\swarrow\greenD{0}$  
$300 \times 10$ |$?$ |$?$| $?$| $?$

Number | Thousands| Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$300$ | | $\purpleD3$| $\swarrow\blueD{0}$ | $\swarrow\greenD{0}$  
$300 \times 10$ |$\purpleD3$| $\blueD{0}$ |$\greenD{0}$| $0$

The answers:

$\begin{align}
&\purpleD3\blueD0\greenD0 \div 10=\purpleD3\blueD0 \\\\
&\purpleD3\blueD0\greenD0\times10=\purpleD3{,}\blueD0\greenD00
\end{align}$

Number | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:

$1{,}870 \div 10$ | |$\goldD{1}$ | $\purpleD{8}$ |$\blueD{7}$

When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the left.

Number | Ten Thousands | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:  | :-: 
$1{,}870$| |$\swarrow\goldD{1}$ | $\swarrow\purpleD{8}$ | $\swarrow\blueD{7}$ | $\swarrow\greenD{0}$

The answers:

&\goldD1\purpleD8{,}\blueD7\greenD00=\goldD1{,}\purpleD8\blueD7\greenD0\times10
\end{align}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Complete the equation with a $\times$ or $\div$ sign.**

$530= 53$  [[☃ dropdown 1]] $10$
hints:
When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **left**.

When **dividing** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **right**.

Each digit of $530$ is one place to the left of the same digit in the number $53$.


Number | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$53$ | | $\swarrow\blueD{5}$ | $\swarrow\greenD{3}$  
$530$ | $\blueD5$ |$\greenD3$ |$0$

Moving each digit to the left means multiplying by $10$:  

$\blueD5\greenD30 = \blueD5\greenD3\times10$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Complete the equation with a $\times$ or $\div$ sign.**
  

$79{,}200$ [[☃ dropdown 1]] $10=7{,}920$
hints:
When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **left**.

When **dividing** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **right**.

Each digit of $7{,}920$ is one place to the right of the same digits in the number $79{,}200$.

Ten thousands | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-:
$\searrow\goldD7$ | $\searrow\purpleD9$ | $\searrow\blueC2$ | $\searrow\greenD0$ |$\cancel0$
 | $\goldD7$ | $\purpleD9$ | $\blueC2$ | $\greenD0$


Moving each digit of $79{,}200$ to the right means dividing by $10$:

$\goldD7\purpleD9{,}\blueD2\greenD00 \div 10 
= \goldD7{,}\purpleD9\blueD2\greenD0$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Complete the equation with a $\times$ or $\div$ sign.**
  

$2{,}500$ [[☃ dropdown 1]] $250=10$
hints:
When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **left**.

When **dividing** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **right**.

Each digit of $250$ is one place to the right of the same digits in the number $2{,}500$.

Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-:
$\searrow\goldD2$ | $\searrow\purpleD5$ | $\searrow\blueD0$ | $\cancel0$ 
 | $\goldD2$ | $\purpleD5$ | $\blueD0$ 


Moving each digit of $2{,}500$ to the right means dividing by $10$:

$\goldD2{,}\purpleD5\blueD0\greenD0 \div 10 = \goldD2\purpleD5\blueD0$ so,

$\goldD2{,}\purpleD5\blueD0\greenD0 \div \goldD2\purpleD5\blueD0 = 10$

When **dividing** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **right**.

Each digit of $3{,}400$ is one place to the right of the same digits in the number $34{,}000$.

 | $\goldD3$ | $\purpleD4$ | $\blueC0$ | $\greenD0$


Moving each digit of $34{,}000$ to the right means dividing by $10$:

$\goldD3\purpleD4{,}\blueD0\greenD00 \div 10 = \goldD3{,}\purpleD4\blueD0\greenD0$ so,

$\goldD3\purpleD4{,}\blueD0\greenD00 \div \goldD3{,}\purpleD4\blueD0\greenD0 = 10$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which number makes the equation true?**

$\square=700 \div 70 $

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **left**.

When **dividing** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **right**.

Each digit of $70$ is one place to the right of the same digit in the number $700$.


Number | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$700$ |$\searrow\purpleD{7}$ | $\searrow\blueD{0}$ | $\searrow\cancel{0}$  
$70$ | |$\purpleD7$ |$\blueD0$

Moving each digit to the right means dividing by $10$:  

$\purpleD7\blueD00\div10=\purpleD7\blueD0$ so,   

$\purpleD7\blueD00\div\purpleD7\blueD0=10$
$10=\purpleD7\blueD00\div\purpleD7\blueD0$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which number makes the equation true?**

$550 \div 55 = \square$

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **left**.

When **dividing** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **right**.

Each digit of $55$ is one place to the right of the same digit in the number $550$.


Number | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$550$ |$\searrow\purpleD{5}$ | $\searrow\blueD{5}$ | $\searrow\cancel{0}$  
$55$ | |$\purpleD5$ |$\blueD5$

Moving each digit to the right means dividing by $10$: 
 
$\purpleD5\blueD50\div10=\purpleD5\blueD5$ so,   

$\purpleD5\blueD50\div\purpleD5\blueD5=10$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Move the cards to match each expression.**

[[☃ matcher 1]]
hints:
When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **left**.

When **dividing** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **right**.

When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the left.

Number | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$4$| |$\swarrow\greenD{4}$  
$10 \times 4$| $\greenD4$ | $0$

$10 \times \greenD4=\greenD40$

When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the left.

Number | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$44$| |$\swarrow\blueD{4}$ | $\swarrow\greenD{4}$  
$44 \times 10$ |$\blueD4$ |$\greenD4$ | $0$

$\blueD4\greenD4 \times 10=\blueD4\greenD40$

When **dividing** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the right.

Number | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$4{,}000$ |$\searrow\goldD{4}$ | $\searrow\purpleD{0}$ | $\searrow\blueD{0}$ | $\searrow\greenD{0}$  
$4{,}000 \div 10$ | |$\goldD{4}$ | $\purpleD{0}$ |$\blueD{0}$

$\goldD4{,}\purpleD0\blueD0\greenD0 \div 10=\goldD4\purpleD0\blueD0$

The answer:

Expression |Card
- | - | -
$10 \times 4$  | $40$
$44 \times 10$ | $440$
$4{,}000\div 10$ | $400$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Move the cards to match each expression.**

[[☃ matcher 1]]
hints:
When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **left**.

When **dividing** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **right**.

Number | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |
$500$ | $\searrow\purpleD{5}$ | $\searrow\blueD{0}$ | $\searrow\greenD{0}$  
$500 \div 10$ | | $\purpleD{5}$ |$\blueD{0}$

$\purpleD5\blueD0\greenD0 \div 10=\purpleD5\blueD0$

When **dividing** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the right.

Number | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:

$\goldD5{,}\purpleD5\blueD0\greenD0 \div 10=\goldD5\purpleD5\blueD0$

When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the left.

Number | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |  :-:
$50$| |  $\swarrow\blueD5$ |$\swarrow\greenD{0}$ 
$50 \times 10$| $\blueD5$ | $\greenD0$ | $0$

$\blueD5\greenD \times10=\blueD5\greenD00$

The answer:

Expression |Card
- | - | -
$500 \div 10$  | $50$
$5{,}500\div 10$ | $550$
$50 \times 10$ | $500$

$99$| |$\swarrow\blueD{9}$ | $\swarrow\greenD{9}$

$10 \times \blueD9\greenD9=\blueD9\greenD90$

When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the left.

Number | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |
$900$ | | $\swarrow\purpleD{9}$ | $\swarrow\blueD{0}$ | $\swarrow\greenD{0}$  
$900 \times 10$ | $\purpleD{9}$ |$\blueD{0}$ |$\greenD0$ | $0$

$\purpleD9\blueD0\greenD0 \times 10=\purpleD9{,}\blueD0\greenD00$

assessment_items.question_content:

[[☃ matcher 1]]
hints:
When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **left**.

When **dividing** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **right**.
Each digit of $33$ is one place to the right of the same digit in the number $330$.

Number | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$330$| $\purpleD3$ |$\searrow\blueD{3}$ | $\searrow\greenD{0}$  
$33$ | |$\greenD3$ | $\blueD3$

$\purpleD3\blueD3\greenD0 \div 10=\purpleD3\blueD3$ so,

$\purpleD3\blueD3\greenD0 \div \purpleD3\blueD3 = 10$
When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the left.

Number | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |
$330$ | | $\swarrow\purpleD{3}$ | $\swarrow\blueD{3}$ | $\swarrow\greenD{0}$  
$10 \times 330$ | $\purpleD{3}$ |$\blueD{3}$ |$\greenD0$ | $0$

$10 \times \purpleD3\blueD3\greenD0 =\purpleD3{,}\blueD3\greenD00$
When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the left.

Number | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |
$303$ | | $\swarrow\purpleD{3}$ | $\swarrow\blueD{0}$ | $\swarrow\greenD{3}$  
$303 \times 10$ | $\purpleD{3}$ |$\blueD{0}$ |$\greenD3$ | $0$

$\purpleD3\blueD0\greenD3 \times 10 =\purpleD3{,}\blueD0\greenD30$
The answer:

Expression |Card
- | - | -
$330\div33$  | $10$
$10\times 330$ | $3{,}300$
$303\times 10$ | $3{,}030$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Move the cards to match each expression.**

[[☃ matcher 1]]
hints:
When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **left**.

When **dividing** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **right**.

Each digit of $80$ is one place to the right of the same digit in the number $800$.


Number | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$800$ |$\searrow\purpleD{8}$ | $\searrow\blueD{0}$ | $\searrow\greenD{0}$  
$80$ | |$\purpleD8$ |$\blueD0$

Moving each digit to the right means dividing by $10$:  

$\purpleD8\blueD00\div10=\purpleD8\blueD0$ so,   

$\purpleD8\blueD00\div\purpleD8\blueD0=10$

When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the left.

Number | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |  :-:
$80$| |  $\swarrow\blueD8$ |$\swarrow\greenD{0}$ 
$10 \times 80$| $\blueD8$ | $\greenD0$ | $0$

$10 \times \blueD{8}\greenD{0} =\blueD8\greenD00$

When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the left.

Number | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |
$880$ | | $\swarrow\purpleD{8}$ | $\swarrow\blueD{8}$ | $\swarrow\greenD{0}$  
$880 \times 10$ | $\purpleD{8}$ |$\blueD{8}$ |$\greenD0$ | $0$

$\purpleD8\blueD8\greenD0 \times 10=\purpleD8{,}\blueD8\greenD00$

The answer:

Expression |Card
- | - | -
$800\div80$   | $10$
$10\times 80$ | $800$
$880\times 10$ | $8{,}800$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Select true or false for each equation.**

[[☃ categorizer 1]]
hints:
When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **left**.

When **dividing** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the **right**.

When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the left.

Number | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |
$670$ | | $\swarrow\purpleD{6}$ | $\swarrow\blueD{7}$ | $\swarrow\greenD{0}$  
$670 \times 10$ | $\purpleD{6}$ |$\blueD{7}$ |$\greenD0$ | $0$

$\purpleD6\blueD7\greenD0 \times 10=\purpleD6{,}\blueD7\greenD00$

When **multiplying** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the left.

Number | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$70$| |$\swarrow\blueD{7}$ | $\swarrow\greenD{0}$  
$70 \times 10$ |$\blueD7$ |$\greenD0$ | $0$

$\blueD7\greenD0 \times 10=\blueD7\greenD00$

When **dividing** by $10$, we shift each digit $1$ place value to the right.

Number | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$6{,}000$ |$\searrow\goldD{6}$ | $\searrow\purpleD{0}$ | $\searrow\blueD{0}$ | $\searrow\cancel0$  
$6{,}000 \div 10$ | |$\goldD{6}$ | $\purpleD{0}$ |$\blueD{0}$

$\goldD6{,}\purpleD0\blueD0\greenD0 \div 10=\goldD6\purpleD0\blueD0$

So, $6{,}000 \div 10\neq 60$.

| True | False
- | - | -
$670 \times 10=6{,}700$ |  $\huge\bullet$ | $\huge\circ$ 
$70 \times 10=700$ | $\huge\bullet$ | $\huge\circ$ 
$6{,}000 \div 10=60$ | $\huge\circ$ | $\huge\bullet$
